rationale: Documentation task for Ruby driver 2.1.0; no driver behavior or spec compliance involved.
Interrupt causes mixed/corrupt connection state; concurrency bug with no specific contradicted spec rule.
collection_names returns only first batch; implementation bug, no specific spec rule named.
Security audit for sensitive data redaction in logs/exceptions; not a spec compliance issue.
Missing write concern option on GridFS delete; API feature request with no clear contradicted spec rule.
RangeError on large number in bson_int32? predicate; Ruby-specific type coercion bug, no BSON spec rule cited.
Thin description; retry on mongos failures, no spec rule cited.
count returns float 128.0 instead of integer 128; CRUD spec requires integer count result.
Driver failed to update topology after primary failover; operational report, cannot confirm specific violated SDAM spec rule.
BSON::Document ||= operator behaves differently from Hash; Ruby-specific API contract issue, not a BSON spec rule.
slaveOk flag missing from debug log output; logging regression with no spec-defined logging requirement cited.
Hostname resolution fails with seed list after upgrading to MongoDB 3.0; regression with no specific spec rule cited.
Ping refresh blocks threads via mutex in 1.x driver; internal threading implementation bug, not a spec violation.
insert_one mutates caller input by replacing string keys with symbols; implementation side-effect, no spec rule cited.
Namespace collision with user-defined Result class; Ruby-specific internal implementation bug, no spec involvement.
Regexp deserialization hangs over SSL due to NULL_BYTE termination handling; implementation bug with no BSON spec rule explicitly contradicted.
Fix retry to raise after max retries and limit count; pre-retryable-reads spec era, no specific spec rule cited.
Commands include $queryOptions when connecting to sharded cluster; implementation bug, no specific wire protocol spec rule cited.
Docs show :find inside :filter but driver expects :filter directly; documentation mismatch/API issue, no spec rule cited.
allow_disk_use returns new object instead of modifying in place; API ergonomics mismatch with docs, not a spec rule.
find_one_and_update returns nil by default; reporter says this differs from Python driver behavior.
SCRAM auth produces intermittent unauthorized errors; operational race condition, no specific auth spec rule cited.
collection_names crashes with NoMethodError on nil; implementation bug with no spec compliance angle.
Missing require for net/http causes NameError on URI constant; Ruby packaging/dependency bug.
Feature request to add fail-fast mode disabling auto-reconnect; not a spec compliance issue.
insert_many raises NoMethodError instead of MaxBSONSize on oversized document; wrong error type deviates from CRUD spec error handling.
Rename showDiskLoc to showRecordId per DRIVERS-219; spec-rollout improvement, driver was not wrong.
Add createCollection options support per DRIVERS-269; spec-rollout feature addition, not a nonconformance.
Driver monkey-patches Hash without checking existing method; Ruby/Rails compatibility bug, not a spec issue.
Auth fails against MongoDB 2.6 with not-authorized error; user-reported compat issue, no specific auth spec rule identified.
BSON::ObjectId() raises when given existing ObjectId; Ruby conversion idiom issue, not a BSON spec rule.
Feature request to use Rails logger by default in Rails apps; not a spec compliance issue.
Performance regression vs Moped; benchmark comparison, not a spec compliance issue.
Performance regression in find vs 1.8 driver; perf issue, not a spec violation.
BSON deserialization much slower in 2.x vs 1.3.1; performance issue, no spec compliance angle.
README improvement for testing instructions; documentation task, no spec compliance involved.
Add save_many to Collection API; feature addition, thin description, no spec rule cited.
Add save_one to Collection API; feature addition, thin description, no spec rule cited.
Cursor leak causing high server memory usage; resource management bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Integer hash keys in $set cause SocketError in 2.2.0-rc0; BSON serialization regression, no spec rule cited.
Collection.rename method missing in new driver; API gap feature request, not a spec compliance issue.
Symbol field queries return nil after upgrade to 2.2.0; BSON Symbol handling regression, no spec rule cited.
Summary states drivers must raise error if messageLength exceeds maxMessageSizeBytes; wire protocol spec requirement not implemented.
GridFS write stream crashes when write concern is nil; nil-handling bug, no specific GridFS spec rule cited.
URI w=majority parsed as Ruby Symbol instead of String; connection string spec requires string value for w.
ArgumentError from nil max_message_size comparison under heavy load; defensive coding implementation bug, no spec rule cited.
insert_many returns only 625 of 10000 inserted_ids; CRUD spec requires all inserted ids be returned.
Question about detecting cursor_not_found error; API usability question, not a spec compliance issue.
Topology not updated after nodes removed/added in RS; cannot identify specific SDAM spec rule violated from description.
BulkWrite result shows n_upserted=1 for 2 actual upserts and n_matched=0 incorrectly; CRUD spec defines correct bulk write result counts.
